name: the-lens
description: Manual Focus's working library of 26 AI marketing skills covering positioning, brand voice, naming, demand-gen, content systems, lifecycle, ops and personal-assistant workflows, plus a setup-the-lens onboarding orchestrator and a video-script-to-heygen renderer. Each workflow skill is the executable companion to a playbook in The Lens. After install, ask Claude to 'set up The Lens' to trigger the welcome skill.
